channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Jamie Carragher and Patrick Vieira react to breaking reports of Pep Guardiola's Man City departure - Sky Sports
